top_signals.title: Stocks Stall as Traders Weigh Peace Deal Prospects: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: A rally in US stocks is pausing after the artificial-intelligence trade fueled the S&P 500’s longest winning streak in more than a year, with investors gauging prospects for an end to the war in the Middle East.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Where US, Iran Stand on Peace Talks, Strait of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: US President Donald Trump said discussions with Iran continue at a rapid pace despite the Islamic Republic’s threats to suspend talks because of Israel’s attacks in Lebanon. Col. Wayne Sanders (Ret.) of Bloomberg Intelligence has more on the talks and the state of traffic in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Solar Makers Launch Space Energy Development Alliance
top_signals.summary: China’s solar manufacturing industry on Tuesday launched a so-called Space Energy Development Alliance as the Chinese solar sector looks to conquering new frontiers amid oversupply at home. At this year’s SNEC PV+ conference in Shanghai, one of the biggest solar industry gatherings in the world, Chinese manufacturers launched the platform, but were stingy on details about projects or missions in the race to harness solar power in space. GCL Technology Holdings Ltd, Trina Solar Co, and Shi Zhengrong, founder of Suntech Power Holdings…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Berkshire Hathaway invests extra $10 billion in Alphabet, deepening bet on AI
top_signals.summary: The deal builds on a stake Berkshire has steadily expanded since late 2025, making Alphabet one of its biggest recent bets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SMBC set to name first local exec as Indian unit head in expansion
top_signals.summary: The appointment is part of a broader leadership reshuffle across Sumitomo Mitsui's banking and nonbanking operations in India.
